title: isodon latifolius
intro: Isodon latifolius, also known as Chinese dwarf sage or Isodon, is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. Isodon latifolius is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. It can be prepared as a tea or used in herbal infusions, often in combination with other herbs, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
